title: project-summary
description: The thesis / 'why' doc. Read first for full context; changes slowly. Optional layer, scaffolded only with --full.

oneLiner.description: One sentence: what the project is.

coreBet.description: The bet that makes this worth building.

coreInsight.description: The non-obvious idea this rests on. Why now, why this angle. Specific enough to be wrong.

audience.description: Who it's for. If you're the first dogfooder, say so.

coreLoop.description: The repeating cycle the product runs, as numbered steps. Name which step carries the real value vs. plumbing.

buildSequencing.description: What gets built first and why — riskiest, highest-value first. What's deferred. The anti-goal.

nearTerm.description: The near-term gate, answerable in a week or two. Specific and falsifiable.

ultimate.description: The ultimate gate that says this worked.

openQuestions.description: Things you don't know yet and will resolve with evidence.
